# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Project Understanding

Explain how this change fits Remiovas and which user problem it solves.

## Verification

List every command you ran and the result.

```bash
yarn lint
yarn build
yarn lint:md
```

If a `test` script exists, run `yarn test` and include the result too.
If your issue requires extra tests, include those commands and results.

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I understood the relevant project context before coding.
- [ ] I applied the 15-minute self-debug rule before asking for help.
- [ ] I reviewed any AI-generated output and I fully understand it.
- [ ] I manually tested the affected flow(s) and confirmed they work.
- [ ] I ran `yarn test` when a test script is available.
- [ ] I did not commit ignored or generated files.
- [ ] All CI/CD workflows and required checks are passing.
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and avoided unrelated file changes.
